case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. ELMER DE LA CRUZ GONGORA ROJAS

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-24-2019 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-24-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-24-2019 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: MICHAEL MAU. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. IS PRESENT LUPE ACEVEDO LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT ELMER DE LA CRUZ GONGORA ROJAS IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MICHAEL MAU CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - (FEE FOR SERVICE: $50.00) SERVED JUN-08-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT ROJAS, ELMER DE LA CRUZ GONGORA
STIPULATION FOR CASE TO BE HEARD BY JUDGE PRO TEM. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY OPORTUN, INC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $445.90 FILED BY OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT ROJAS, ELMER DE LA CRUZ GONGORA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-24-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ROJAS, ELMER DE LA CRUZ GONGORA $445.90 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $525.90 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
